content: The 2023-24 El Nino event reduced global rice production by 3.2 MMT, with India's export ban (July 2023) amplifying price impacts. Thai 5% broken rice prices rose 25% to $650/tonne by Q1 2024. However, favorable conditions in Brazil produced record soybean harvests (155 MMT), offsetting some losses. NOAA forecasts 60% probability of La Nina developing by Q3 2025, potentially reversing these patterns.
source: FAO Food Price Index & Crop Prospects
